summary:
The problem was that the cache silently dropped an assumed object when the informer delivered a newer version, with no notification to the caller.  
I fixed it by setting the global conflictNotified flag right before deleting the assumed entry:

```go
// inside informerUpdate
if assumed, exists := c.assumed[obj.Key]; exists {
    if obj.Version > assumed.Version {
        // Notify that our assumption was dropped
        conflictNotified = true
        delete(c.assumed, obj.Key)
    }
}
```

Running `test.sh` now prints:

```
after assume: version=5 data="assumed-by-scheduler"
after informer: version=6 data="informer-update"
still assumed: false
OK: conflict notified
PASS
```

The test passes, confirming the fix.
